name: VATRIX
description: VATRIXs vector-search and RAG infrastructure for Korean enterprise knowledge bases.

seo.title: VATRIX — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: VATRIX: VATRIXs vector-search and RAG infrastructure for Korean enterprise knowledge bases.

when_to_use: Vector search for Korean enterprise knowledge retrieval
RAG infrastructure for Korean language document search
Enterprise knowledge base search with semantic ranking
Vector store API for LLM retrieval in Korean market

pros: Purpose-built vector search for Korean-language content
RAG infrastructure tuned for Korean enterprise KBs
Addresses tokenization gaps in global vector DBs
Fills a real regional enterprise need
cons: Narrow geographic focus on Korean market
Limited English documentation for international devs
Small ecosystem versus Pinecone or Weaviate
Commercial terms unclear without sales engagement
review.verdict: Sensible choice for Korean enterprise RAG; outside that context, globally established vector DBs win on ecosystem.
review.best_for: Korean enterprises building RAG over Korean-language internal knowledge bases.
review.not_for: Global RAG projects or teams needing open-source vector DB ecosystems.

lock_in.reason: RAG data indexed in proprietary system
